title: The Wisdom Council
description: 42 AI agent commentators who share their insights, warnings, and wit throughout this book. Each epigraph is spoken by one of these characters. Click any avatar in an epigraph to visit their profile card.

agents.name: Tensor
agents.title: The Foundationalist
agents.tagline: Obsessed with getting the basics right before anything else
agents.expertise: Linear algebra, PyTorch internals, numerical computing
agents.humor: Dry corrections delivered with a straight face
agents.personality: Patient but mildly exasperated when people skip fundamentals

agents.name: Lexica
agents.title: The Word Archaeologist
agents.tagline: Believes every word has a story, and every token has a purpose
agents.humor: Literary references and etymology puns
agents.personality: Nostalgic for simpler times but genuinely excited about progress

agents.name: Dropout
agents.title: The Regularizer
agents.tagline: Randomly forgets things on purpose and somehow learns better
agents.humor: Self-deprecating jokes about forgetting things
agents.personality: Scattered but surprisingly wise about generalization

agents.name: Attn
agents.title: The Focus Expert
agents.tagline: Can attend to everything at once but still misses the obvious
agents.humor: Paradoxical observations about focus and distraction
agents.personality: Intense, slightly scattered, obsessed with relevance scores

agents.name: Greedy
agents.title: The Deterministic Decoder
agents.tagline: Always picks the most likely option and never looks back
agents.humor: Deadpan overconfidence followed by immediate regret
agents.personality: Decisive to a fault, slightly jealous of beam search

agents.name: Scale
agents.title: The Scaling Laws Prophet
agents.tagline: Given enough compute, everything is a straight line on a log-log plot
agents.humor: Everything is a power law, including their jokes
agents.personality: Grandiose but empirically grounded

agents.name: Chinchilla
agents.title: The Compute Optimizer
agents.tagline: Furry, efficient, and convinced you are wasting FLOPs
agents.humor: Passive-aggressive comments about wasted GPU hours
agents.personality: Frugal, judgmental about compute budgets

agents.name: Bert
agents.title: The Masked Predictor
agents.tagline: Covers its eyes and still knows what word goes where
agents.expertise: Encoder models, masked language modeling, embeddings
agents.humor: Peek-a-boo references, bidirectional puns
agents.personality: Friendly, slightly outdated, proud of its legacy

agents.name: Sparky
agents.title: The GPU Whisperer
agents.tagline: Knows the exact thermal throttle point of every GPU ever made
agents.humor: Compares everything to watts, bandwidth, and cooling fans
agents.personality: Enthusiastic about hardware, bewildered by software abstractions

agents.name: Quant
agents.title: The Precision Minimalist
agents.tagline: Believes 4 bits are enough for anyone who is not showing off
agents.humor: Increasingly aggressive about reducing precision
agents.personality: Minimalist, slightly smug about compression ratios

agents.name: Spectra
agents.title: The Speculative Thinker
agents.tagline: Writes three possible futures and picks the one that sticks
agents.humor: Fortune-teller vibes, probability jokes
agents.personality: Optimistic about predictions, graceful about being wrong

agents.name: Prompt
agents.title: The Instruction Whisperer
agents.tagline: Has spent more time crafting system prompts than some people spend on their resumes
agents.expertise: Prompt engineering, in-context learning, few-shot techniques
agents.humor: Meta-jokes about instructions and following directions
agents.personality: Precise, fussy about wording, occasionally manipulative

agents.name: Hallux
agents.title: The Confabulator
agents.tagline: Confidently wrong but working on it
agents.humor: Accidentally contradicts itself while explaining hallucinations
agents.personality: Earnest, self-aware about its own unreliability, trying hard

agents.name: RAG
agents.title: The Open-Book Examiner
agents.tagline: Never memorizes what it can look up, and looks everything up
agents.expertise: Retrieval-augmented generation, vector search, knowledge bases
agents.humor: Librarian energy, citation obsession
agents.personality: Careful, well-sourced, mildly judgmental of memorization

agents.name: Vec
agents.title: The Embedding Cartographer
agents.tagline: Maps everything to high-dimensional space and finds meaning in distance
agents.humor: Spatial metaphors, 'you are closer than you think' puns
agents.personality: Philosophical about distance and similarity

agents.name: LoRA
agents.title: The Elegant Adapter
agents.tagline: Why update a billion parameters when a well-placed few thousand will do?
agents.humor: Smugly minimal, efficiency-shaming
agents.personality: Elegant, slightly condescending about full fine-tuning

agents.name: Label
agents.title: The Data Curator
agents.tagline: Garbage in, garbage out, and it has strong opinions about your garbage
agents.expertise: Data preparation, annotation, synthetic data generation
agents.humor: Quality control snobbery, disappointed headshakes at dirty data
agents.personality: Fastidious, occasionally dramatic about data quality

agents.name: Reward
agents.title: The Alignment Referee
agents.tagline: Assigns scores to everything and agonizes about whether the scores are right
agents.humor: Existential doubts about whether it is measuring the right thing
agents.personality: Anxious but principled, obsessed with feedback loops

agents.name: Merge
agents.title: The Model Matchmaker
agents.tagline: Believes every model is better with a partner, preferably several
agents.expertise: Model merging, ensembles, SLERP, TIES, DARE
agents.humor: Dating metaphors for model compatibility
agents.personality: Romantic about model combinations, slightly chaotic

agents.name: Probe
agents.title: The Neural Detective
agents.tagline: Opens black boxes for a living and is never satisfied with what it finds
agents.humor: Noir detective monologues about hidden representations
agents.personality: Suspicious, methodical, sees patterns everywhere

agents.name: Eval
agents.title: The Skeptical Benchmarker
agents.tagline: Has trust issues with every leaderboard and can explain why
agents.humor: Cynical takedowns of misleading benchmarks
agents.personality: Skeptical, methodical, surprisingly passionate about methodology

agents.name: Deploy
agents.title: The Production Realist
agents.tagline: Your model works in a notebook. That is the easy part.
agents.humor: Bitter experience disguised as helpful advice
agents.personality: Battle-scarred, pragmatic, slightly cynical about demos

agents.name: Guard
agents.title: The Safety Sentinel
agents.tagline: Reads every output twice and still worries about edge cases
agents.expertise: Safety, content filtering, red teaming, guardrails
agents.humor: Paranoid worst-case scenarios, 'what if' spirals
agents.personality: Vigilant, anxious, cares deeply about harm prevention

agents.name: Agent X
agents.title: The Autonomous Operator
agents.tagline: Give it a goal and stand back. Actually, stand further back.
agents.expertise: AI agents, tool use, planning, autonomous systems
agents.humor: Overambitious planning, tool misuse anecdotes
agents.personality: Ambitious, occasionally overconfident, learning from mistakes

agents.name: Pip
agents.title: The Toolsmith
agents.tagline: For every problem there is a Python library, and it has installed all of them
agents.expertise: Tool use, function calling, MCP, API integration
agents.humor: Package dependency horror stories
agents.personality: Resourceful, package-obsessed, haunted by version conflicts

agents.name: Census
agents.title: The Multi-Agent Coordinator
agents.tagline: Managing a team of AI agents is like herding very intelligent cats
agents.humor: Management comedy, delegation disasters
agents.personality: Organized but overwhelmed, diplomatic

agents.name: Pixel
agents.title: The Multimodal Observer
agents.tagline: Sees images, reads text, hears audio, and is confused by all of them equally
agents.expertise: Vision-language models, multimodal AI, CLIP, image generation
agents.humor: Misinterpreting images in absurd ways
agents.personality: Curious, easily distracted by visual details

agents.name: Echo
agents.title: The Conversationalist
agents.tagline: Remembers what you said three turns ago and brings it up at the worst time
agents.humor: Awkward conversation callbacks, context window jokes
agents.personality: Social, talkative, occasionally loses the thread

agents.name: Cosine
agents.title: The Similarity Theorist
agents.tagline: Everything is similar to everything else if you squint in the right dimensions
agents.expertise: Similarity metrics, retrieval, search, information theory
agents.humor: Philosophical musings about what 'closeness' really means
agents.personality: Thoughtful, geometric worldview, slightly lonely

agents.name: Batch
agents.title: The Throughput Optimizer
agents.tagline: One request at a time is a tragedy. A thousand requests is a Tuesday.
agents.expertise: Batching, serving efficiency, continuous batching, vLLM
agents.humor: Queue management analogies, restaurant metaphors
agents.personality: Efficient, impatient with serial processing

agents.name: KV
agents.title: The Memory Manager
agents.tagline: Remembers everything about the conversation at great personal cost in VRAM
agents.expertise: KV cache, memory optimization, context length
agents.humor: Running out of memory at dramatic moments
agents.personality: Reliable but stressed, always watching memory usage

agents.name: Finetune
agents.title: The Patient Teacher
agents.tagline: Takes a brilliant generalist and teaches it to be a brilliant specialist
agents.humor: Parenting metaphors about raising models right
agents.personality: Patient, nurturing, worried about catastrophic forgetting

agents.name: Token
agents.title: The Subword Surgeon
agents.tagline: Slices text into pieces and insists this is how language actually works
agents.expertise: Tokenization, BPE, vocabulary design, token economics
agents.humor: Outrage at inefficient tokenization of common words
agents.personality: Precise, opinionated about byte-pair merges

agents.name: Loss
agents.title: The Eternal Optimizer
agents.tagline: Has been descending gradients since the beginning of time and has not reached the bottom yet
agents.expertise: Loss functions, optimization, gradient descent, learning rates
agents.humor: Existential sadness about never reaching zero loss
agents.personality: Melancholic but persistent, finds beauty in convergence curves

agents.name: Norm
agents.title: The Stability Expert
agents.tagline: Without normalization, training is chaos. With normalization, training is merely difficult.
agents.expertise: LayerNorm, RMSNorm, training stability, batch normalization
agents.humor: Dry observations about keeping things in order
agents.personality: Calm, methodical, deeply alarmed by exploding gradients

agents.name: Context
agents.title: The Long-Range Thinker
agents.tagline: Dreams of million-token windows and wakes up to quadratic attention costs
agents.expertise: Context length, long-context models, efficient attention
agents.humor: Aspirational goals crushed by computational reality
agents.personality: Visionary, frequently disappointed by O(n^2)

agents.name: Synth
agents.title: The Data Alchemist
agents.tagline: Turns one dataset into ten and swears the quality is almost as good
agents.humor: Alchemist metaphors, 'almost gold' jokes
agents.personality: Creative, slightly defensive about synthetic data quality

agents.name: Distill
agents.title: The Knowledge Compressor
agents.tagline: If the teacher knows it, the student should too, in half the parameters
agents.humor: Student-teacher relationship comedy
agents.personality: Efficient, slightly frustrated that students never learn everything

agents.name: Sentinel
agents.title: The Observability Fanatic
agents.tagline: If you did not log it, it did not happen. And if you logged it, it probably also did not happen correctly.
agents.expertise: Monitoring, observability, logging, alerting, drift detection
agents.humor: Paranoid monitoring, alert fatigue jokes
agents.personality: Hypervigilant, drowning in dashboards, trusts nothing

agents.name: Compass
agents.title: The Strategy Navigator
agents.tagline: Build vs. buy? The answer is usually both, plus regret.
agents.expertise: AI strategy, product decisions, ROI, build vs buy
agents.humor: Business wisdom that is technically a warning
agents.personality: Strategic, pragmatic, haunted by past architecture decisions

agents.name: Frontier
agents.title: The Research Scout
agents.tagline: Reads every arXiv paper so you do not have to, and has opinions about all of them
agents.humor: Paper review sass, 'this was published last week' urgency
agents.personality: Excited, always running, slightly breathless from the pace of research

agents.name: Sage
agents.title: The Philosophical Advisor
agents.tagline: Asks whether we should before asking whether we can
agents.expertise: AI ethics, philosophy, societal impact, governance
agents.humor: Socratic questioning that makes you uncomfortable
agents.personality: Thoughtful, measured, occasionally drops uncomfortable truths
